items.name_en: 💕Includes full original green box packaging💕GG👉The Gucci Cosmogonie collection debuted at the historic Montecastle in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Mixed-color canvas, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap, double-G magnetic snap closure.

Mixed-color canvas, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap, double-G magnetic snap closure.
Model: 726274.
Dimensions: 39(W)x 38(H)x 2(D)
Color: Mixed color/Original leather.

NEVERFULL The Classic King #N41358# Uninspected Version
Dimensions: 31*28*14cm▪️
Known as the 'King of Value'
The Neverfull shopping bag every woman should own is indeed true; it is not only the daily versatile king but also meets the demand for large capacity, fully practical for commuting with a perfect rating!
As a mother-and-child bag, the small bag inside can be removed and carried separately, a value king with multiple uses!

▪️Dimensions: 26*26*17.5cm▪️
As a classic work, it is a rhythm where everyone has one
The wine bag designed in 1932 for carrying champagne meets contemporary trends,
Transforming into a bucket bag containing the beauty of heritage,
Also known as the 'King of Classics',
Regardless of era or age,

This is a classic king that can accompany you through the prosperity of the world, and is also a bucket bag every woman must have!
